title: Sai da Frente
director: Tom Payne, Abilio Pereira de Almeida
writer: Tom Payne, Abilio Pereira de Almeida
actors: Amácio Mazzaropi, Ludy Veloso, Leila Parisi
plot: Isidoro Colepicula is a humble truck driver hired to transport some furniture from São Paulo to Santos, in his worn out truck he calls "Anastácio". Hiding among the pieces travels a bride who's trying to escape her own marriage. W...
